title: Put enum type into scope when declaring it

features.name: enum declared inside packed struct
features.description: Code should include an enum type declared inside a packed struct definition

features.name: enum typedef used as class property
features.description: Code should include a typedef enum used as a class property type where the enum is declared outside the class

features.name: enum name collision in class scope
features.description: Code should include an enum declared in a class followed by a typedef with the same enum name
